instructions: Preserve unrelated work and stop on overlapping changes.
Never expose secret values; document only environment variable names.
Use the active evidence profile and keep rollback proportional.
Do not mark work complete without observable evidence.
Keep claims linked to a current source of truth.
Use relative links and keep critical operational documents within two links of repository entry points.
Record drift explicitly instead of silently choosing between contradictory sources.
Use exact local tool versions and deterministic output.
Treat remote mutations and authentication as manual gates unless separately authorized.
Include a failing or negative case when behavior can regress.
Treat unexpected warnings or logs as evidence to classify.
Do not weaken assertions merely to make a suite pass.
